groups.name: app.google.oauth
groups.description: Google OAuth 2.0 configuration properties for authentication.

groups.name: app.jwt
groups.description: JWT token configuration including expiry times.

groups.name: app.security
groups.description: Security configuration including CORS and cookie settings.

properties.name: app.google.oauth.client-id
properties.description: Google OAuth Client ID from Google Cloud Console.

properties.name: app.google.oauth.client-secret
properties.description: Google OAuth Client Secret from Google Cloud Console.

properties.name: app.google.oauth.redirect-uri
properties.description: OAuth callback URL where Google redirects after authentication.

properties.name: app.google.oauth.token-url
properties.description: Google OAuth token endpoint URL.

properties.name: app.google.oauth.user-info-url
properties.description: Google user info endpoint URL to fetch user details.

properties.name: app.google.oauth.authorization-url
properties.description: Google OAuth authorization endpoint URL.

properties.name: app.google.oauth.scope
properties.description: OAuth scopes to request (e.g., openid email profile).

properties.name: app.google.oauth.access-type
properties.description: OAuth access type (online or offline).

properties.name: app.google.oauth.prompt
properties.description: OAuth prompt parameter (none, consent, select_account).

properties.name: app.jwt.access-token-expiry-days
properties.description: Number of days until access token expires.

properties.name: app.jwt.refresh-token-expiry-days
properties.description: Number of days until refresh token expires.

properties.name: app.security.allowed-email-domains
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed email domains for authentication.

properties.name: app.security.dev-auth-enabled
properties.description: Enable development authentication bypass.

properties.name: app.security.developer-emails
properties.description: Comma-separated list of developer emails for special access.

properties.name: app.security.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: List of allowed origins for CORS requests.

properties.name: app.security.cors.max-age
properties.description: Maximum age (in seconds) for CORS preflight cache.

properties.name: app.security.cookie.secure
properties.description: Whether cookies should be marked as secure (HTTPS only).

properties.name: app.security.cookie.same-site
properties.description: SameSite cookie attribute (Strict, Lax, or None).

properties.name: spring.h2.console.enabled
properties.description: Enable the H2 database console for web-based database access.

properties.name: spring.h2.console.path
properties.description: Path at which the H2 console is available.

values.description: Request offline access to get refresh token.
Do not display authentication or consent screens.
Prompt user to select an account.
Cookie only sent in first-party context.
Cookie sent in all contexts (requires Secure flag).
